page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Coev-Web platform is a user-friendly interface of the command-line program Coev. The platform allows the evaluation of coevolving positions and their evolutionary profile based on the aligned sequences and a phylogenetic tree. It can also simulate coevolving pairs of positions along a given phylogenetic tree.
